name: Dexter Table Lamp W/ USB Port - 13.5 Inch Height - TBL4460 - Black - Safavieh
description: Illuminate your space with the Dexter table lamp, measuring 13.5 inches. This black iron lamp offers a sleek and modern touch to any room. Its compact design makes it perfect for your desk, bedside, or living area. Crafted from durable iron, this lamp features a fabric shade that diffuses light softly, creating a warm and inviting atmosphere. The Dexter lamp also includes a built-in USB port, ensuring your devices can be charged conveniently without cluttering your space. Its minimalist style allows it to blend effortlessly with various decor styles, adding a touch of elegance. Enjoy the blend of functionality and style with this versatile lamp, and keep your surroundings well-lit while staying connected.
